name: lender_fit_routing_copilot_hard_gate_rules
title: Lender Fit Routing Copilot Generic Hard-Gate Rules
purpose: Apply generic mandatory routing checks before weighted scoring without inventing provider-specific requirements.

policy.required_disclosure: This analysis is an internal routing aid based on the information and product criteria provided. It is not an approval, offer, guarantee, or underwriting decision. Eligibility, terms, costs, and availability may change and require current lender review.
policy.family_routing_rule: Family-routing thresholds from funding-routing-rules.registry.json are preliminary route signals, not provider hard gates. Product-row criteria remain controlling.

result_catalog.meaning: The declared mandatory rule is satisfied.
The product fails a mandatory declared rule and is excluded from normal ranking.
The rule is ambiguous, conditional, stale, or requires authorized human interpretation.
Required borrower or product data is unavailable; final ranking must stop.

operator_catalog.description: Borrower or product value equals the required value.
Borrower or product value does not equal the prohibited value.
Borrower numeric value meets or exceeds the product minimum.
Borrower numeric value is at or below the product maximum.
Borrower numeric value falls between declared minimum and maximum values.
Borrower scalar value appears in the product list.
Borrower scalar value does not appear in the restricted product list.
Borrower array shares at least one value with the product array.
Borrower array contains every required product value.
Required field is not null, blank, or missing.
Criteria verification date satisfies the configured freshness policy.
One value materially conflicts with another declared source or field.

rules.name: Product Active Status

messages.fail: Product Active Status failed. Expose the borrower value, product requirement, and source.
messages.review: Product Active Status requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Product Active Status cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: Product value must be true. Inactive products are excluded.

rules.name: Criteria Freshness

messages.fail: Criteria Freshness failed. Expose the borrower value, product requirement, and source.
messages.review: Criteria Freshness requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Criteria Freshness cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: Current: 0-30 days; Review Soon: 31-90; Stale: >90; no date: Unverified.

rules.name: Required Collateral Compatibility

messages.fail: Required Collateral Compatibility failed. Expose the borrower value, product requirement, and source.
messages.review: Required Collateral Compatibility requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Required Collateral Compatibility cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: If the product explicitly requires none, evaluate that declaration rather than forcing collateral.

messages.review: Personal Guarantee Compatibility requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Personal Guarantee Compatibility cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: Conditional requirements must route to human review.

messages.missing_data: Supported Use of Funds cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.name: Prohibited Use of Funds

messages.fail: Prohibited Use of Funds failed. Expose the borrower value, product requirement, and source.
messages.review: Prohibited Use of Funds requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Prohibited Use of Funds cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: Implement array intersection logic so any prohibited use can fail the gate.

rules.name: Required Document Availability

messages.fail: Required Document Availability failed. Expose the borrower value, product requirement, and source.
messages.review: Required Document Availability requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Required Document Availability cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: A document gap may be fixable; expose missing document categories.

rules.name: Ownership or Entity Requirement

messages.fail: Ownership or Entity Requirement failed. Expose the borrower value, product requirement, and source.
messages.review: Ownership or Entity Requirement requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Ownership or Entity Requirement cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: Provider-specific entity rules may be added only when verified in a future rule set.

rules.name: Conflicting Critical Borrower Data

messages.fail: Conflicting Critical Borrower Data failed. Expose the borrower value, product requirement, and source.
messages.review: Conflicting Critical Borrower Data requires human review.
messages.missing_data: Conflicting Critical Borrower Data cannot be evaluated because required data is missing.

rules.notes: Any material conflict routes to missing-data or exception review; do not select the favorable value.
